sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31688" key="e(kato/ntoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκᾰτόντ-ορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐρέσσω</etym>) <sense id="n31688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hundredoared,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
